verses.latin_vulgate: Accidit quoque ut ibi esset vir Belial, nomine Seba, filius Bochri, vir Jemineus : et cecinit buccina, et ait : Non est nobis pars in David, neque hæreditas in filio Isai : revertere in tabernacula tua, Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשָׁ֨ם נִקְרָ֜א אִ֣ישׁ בְּלִיַּ֗עַל וּשְׁמ֛וֹ שֶׁ֥בַע בֶּן־בִּכְרִ֖י אִ֣ישׁ יְמִינִ֑י וַיִּתְקַ֣ע בַּשֹּׁפָ֗ר וַ֠יֹּ֠אמֶר אֵֽין־לָ֨נוּ חֵ֜לֶק בְּדָוִ֗ד וְלֹ֤א נַחֲלָה־לָ֙נוּ֙ בְּבֶן־יִשַׁ֔י אִ֥ישׁ לְאֹהָלָ֖יו יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And there happened to be there a man of Belial, whose name was Seba, the son of Bochri, a man of Jemini: and he sounded the trumpet, and said: We have no part in David, nor inheritance in the son of Isai: return to thy dwellings, O Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta siihen tuli yksi kuuluisa Belialin mies, jonka nimi oli Seba Bikrin poika Jeministä; se soitti basunalla ja sanoi: ei meillä ole yhtäkään osaa Davidissa eikä yhtäkään perimistä Isain pojassa, itsekukin palatkaan majaansa, o Israel!
verses.king_james: And there happened to be there a man of Belial, whose name was Sheba, the son of Bichri, a Benjamite: and he blew a trumpet, and said, We have no part in David, neither have we inheritance in the son of Jesse: every man to his tents, O Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et separatus est omnis Israël a David, secutusque est Seba filium Bochri : viri autem Juda adhæserunt regi suo a Jordane usque Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֜עַל כׇּל־אִ֤ישׁ יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ מֵאַחֲרֵ֣י דָוִ֔ד אַחֲרֵ֖י שֶׁ֣בַע בֶּן־בִּכְרִ֑י וְאִ֤ישׁ יְהוּדָה֙ דָּבְק֣וּ בְמַלְכָּ֔ם מִן־הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן וְעַד־יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And all Israel departed from David, and followed Seba the son of Bochri: but the men of Juda stuck to their king from the Jordan unto Jerusalem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin jokainen Israelissa luopui Davidista, ja seurasivat Sebaa Bikrin poikaa. Mutta Juudan miehet riippuivat kuninkaassansa Jordanista Jerusalemiin asti.
verses.king_james: So every man of Israel went up from after David, and followed Sheba the son of Bichri: but the men of Judah clave unto their king, from Jordan even to Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque venisset rex in domum suam in Jerusalem, tulit decem mulieres concubinas quas dereliquerat ad custodiendam domum, et tradidit eas in custodiam, alimenta eis præbens : et non est ingressus ad eas, sed erant clausæ usque in diem mortis suæ in viduitate viventes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֨א דָוִ֣ד אֶל־בֵּיתוֹ֮ יְרוּשָׁלַ֒͏ִם֒ וַיִּקַּ֣ח הַמֶּ֡לֶךְ אֵ֣ת עֶשֶׂר־נָשִׁ֣ים ׀ פִּלַגְשִׁ֡ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר הִנִּ֩יחַ֩ לִשְׁמֹ֨ר הַבַּ֜יִת וַֽיִּתְּנֵ֤ם בֵּית־מִשְׁמֶ֙רֶת֙ וַֽיְכַלְכְּלֵ֔ם וַאֲלֵיהֶ֖ם לֹא־בָ֑א וַתִּהְיֶ֧ינָה צְרֻר֛וֹת עַד־י֥וֹם מֻתָ֖ן אַלְמְנ֥וּת חַיּֽוּת׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And when the king was come into his house at Jerusalem, he took the ten women his concubines, whom he had left to keep the house, and put them inward, allowing them provisions: and he went not in unto them, but they were shut up unto the day of their death living in widowhood.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David tuli kotiansa Jerusalemiin, ja kuningas otti ne kymmenen jalkavaimoa, jotka hän oli jättänyt huonetta vartioitsemaan, ja antoi heidän kätkettää, ja elätti heitä ja ei mennyt heidän tykönsä; ja he olivat salvatut kuolemaansa asti leskeydessänsä.
verses.king_james: And David came to his house at Jerusalem; and the king took the ten women his concubines, whom he had left to keep the house, and put them in ward, and fed them, but went not in unto them. So they were shut up unto the day of their death, living in widowhood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit autem rex Amasæ : Convoca mihi omnes viros Juda in diem tertium, et tu adesto præsens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ אֶל־עֲמָשָׂ֔א הַזְעֶק־לִ֥י אֶת־אִישׁ־יְהוּדָ֖ה שְׁלֹ֣שֶׁת יָמִ֑ים וְאַתָּ֖ה פֹּ֥ה עֲמֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the king said to Amasa: Assemble to me all the men of Juda against the third day, and be thou here present.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuningas sanoi Amasalle: kokoa minun tyköni Juudan miehet kolmena päivänä, ja sinun pitää myös itse läsnä oleman.
verses.king_james: Then said the king to Amasa, Assemble me the men of Judah within three days, and be thou here present.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abiit ergo Amasa ut convocaret Judam, et moratus est extra placitum quod ei constituerat rex.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ עֲמָשָׂ֖א לְהַזְעִ֣יק אֶת־יְהוּדָ֑ה (וייחר) [וַיּ֕וֹחֶר] מִן־הַמּוֹעֵ֖ד אֲשֶׁ֥ר יְעָדֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: So Amasa went to assemble the men of Juda, but he tarried beyond the set time which the king had appointed him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Amasa meni kokoomaan Juudan miehiä, ja hän viipyi määrätyn ajan ylitse.
verses.king_james: So Amasa went to assemble the men of Judah: but he tarried longer than the set time which he had appointed him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ait autem David ad Abisai : Nunc magis afflicturus est nos Seba filius Bochri quam Absalom : tolle igitur servos domini tui, et persequere eum, ne forte inveniat civitates munitas, et effugiat nos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר דָּוִד֙ אֶל־אֲבִישַׁ֔י עַתָּ֗ה יֵ֧רַֽע לָ֛נוּ שֶׁ֥בַע בֶּן־בִּכְרִ֖י מִן־אַבְשָׁל֑וֹם אַ֠תָּ֠ה קַ֞ח אֶת־עַבְדֵ֤י אֲדֹנֶ֙יךָ֙ וּרְדֹ֣ף אַחֲרָ֔יו פֶּן־מָ֥צָא ל֛וֹ עָרִ֥ים בְּצֻר֖וֹת וְהִצִּ֥יל עֵינֵֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David said to Abisai: Now will Seba the son of Bochri do us more harm than did Absalom: take thou therefore the servants of thy lord, and pursue after him, lest he find fenced cities, and escape us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin David sanoi Abisaille: nyt Seba Bikrin poika enempi meitä vahingoitsee kuin Absalom: ota siis herras palveliat ja aja häntä takaa, ettei hän löytäisi vahvoja kaupungeita ja pääsisi meidän silmäimme edestä.
verses.king_james: And David said to Abishai, Now shall Sheba the son of Bichri do us more harm than did Absalom: take thou thy lord’s servants, and pursue after him, lest he get him fenced cities, and escape us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressi sunt ergo cum eo viri Joab, Cerethi quoque et Phelethi : et omnes robusti exierunt de Jerusalem ad persequendum Seba filium Bochri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצְא֤וּ אַחֲרָיו֙ אַנְשֵׁ֣י יוֹאָ֔ב וְהַכְּרֵתִ֥י וְהַפְּלֵתִ֖י וְכׇל־הַגִּבֹּרִ֑ים וַיֵּֽצְאוּ֙ מִיר֣וּשָׁלַ֔͏ִם לִרְדֹּ֕ף אַחֲרֵ֖י שֶׁ֥בַע בֶּן־בִּכְרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Joab's men went out with him, and the Cerethi and the Phelethi: and all the valiant men went out of Jerusalem to pursue after Seba the son of Bochri.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin läksivät hänen kanssansa Joabin miehet, ja Kretit ja Pletit, ja kaikki väkevät. Ja he läksivät Jerusalemista ajamaan Sebaa Bikrin poikaa takaa.
verses.king_james: And there went out after him Joab’s men, and the Cherethites, and the Pelethites, and all the mighty men: and they went out of Jerusalem, to pursue after Sheba the son of Bichri.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque illi essent juxta lapidem grandem qui est in Gabaon, Amasa veniens occurrit eis. Porro Joab vestitus erat tunica stricta ad mensuram habitus sui, et desuper accinctus gladio dependente usque ad ilia, in vagina, qui fabricatus levi motu egredi poterat, et percutere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֗ם עִם־הָאֶ֤בֶן הַגְּדוֹלָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּגִבְע֔וֹן וַעֲמָשָׂ֖א בָּ֣א לִפְנֵיהֶ֑ם וְיוֹאָ֞ב חָג֣וּר ׀ מִדּ֣וֹ לְבֻשׁ֗וֹ וְעָלָ֞ו חֲג֥וֹר חֶ֙רֶב֙ מְצֻמֶּ֤דֶת עַל־מׇתְנָיו֙ בְּתַעְרָ֔הּ וְה֥וּא יָצָ֖א וַתִּפֹּֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And when they were at the great stone which is in Gabaon, Amasa coming met them. And Joab had on a close coat of equal length with his habit, and over it was girded with a sword hanging down to his flank, in a scabbard, made in such manner as to come out with the least motion and strike.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin he joutuivat suuren vahan tykö Gibeoniin, tuli Amasa heidän eteensä. Mutta Joab oli vyötetty päällisvaatteissansa, ja sen päällä miekan vyö, joka riippui hänen kupeissansa tupessa, ja koska hän kävi, taisi se pudota.
verses.king_james: When they were at the great stone which is in Gibeon, Amasa went before them. And Joab’s garment that he had put on was girded unto him, and upon it a girdle with a sword fastened upon his loins in the sheath thereof; and as he went forth it fell out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit itaque Joab ad Amasam : Salve mi frater. Et tenuit manu dextera mentum Amasæ, quasi osculans eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יוֹאָב֙ לַעֲמָשָׂ֔א הֲשָׁל֥וֹם אַתָּ֖ה אָחִ֑י וַתֹּ֜חֶז יַד־יְמִ֥ין יוֹאָ֛ב בִּזְקַ֥ן עֲמָשָׂ֖א לִנְשׇׁק־לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joab said to Amasa: God save thee, my brother. And he took Amasa by the chin with his right hand to kiss him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Joab sanoi Amasalle: oletkos rauhassa, minun veljeni? Ja Joab tarttui oikialla kädellänsä Amasan partaan, suuta antaaksensa hänen.
verses.king_james: And Joab said to Amasa, Art thou in health, my brother? And Joab took Amasa by the beard with the right hand to kiss him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Amasa non observavit gladium quem habebat Joab : qui percussit eum in latere, et effudit intestina ejus in terram, nec secundum vulnus apposuit : et mortuus est. Joab autem, et Abisai frater ejus, persecuti sunt Seba filium Bochri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲמָשָׂ֨א לֹא־נִשְׁמַ֜ר בַּחֶ֣רֶב ׀ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בְּיַד־יוֹאָ֗ב וַיַּכֵּ֩הוּ֩ בָ֨הּ אֶל־הַחֹ֜מֶשׁ וַיִּשְׁפֹּ֨ךְ מֵעָ֥יו אַ֛רְצָה וְלֹא־שָׁ֥נָה ל֖וֹ וַיָּמֹ֑ת וְיוֹאָב֙ וַאֲבִישַׁ֣י אָחִ֔יו רָדַ֕ף אַחֲרֵ֖י שֶׁ֥בַע בֶּן־בִּכְרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Amasa did not take notice of the sword, which Joab had, and he struck him in the side, and shed out his bowels to the ground, and gave him not a second wound, and he died. And Joab, and Abisai his brother pursued after Seba the son of Bochri.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta ei Amasa ottanut vaaria miekasta joka oli Joabin kädessä: ja hän pisti sillä häntä vatsaan ja vuodatti hänen sisällyksensä maalle, eikä häntä enää pistänyt, ja hän kuoli. Mutta Joab ja hänen veljensä Abisai ajoivat Sebaa Bikrin poikaa takaa.
verses.king_james: But Amasa took no heed to the sword that was in Joab’s hand: so he smote him therewith in the fifth rib, and shed out his bowels to the ground, and struck him not again; and he died. So Joab and Abishai his brother pursued after Sheba the son of Bichri.

verses.latin_vulgate: Interea quidam viri, cum stetissent juxta cadaver Amasæ, de sociis Joab, dixerunt : Ecce qui esse voluit pro Joab comes David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִישׁ֙ עָמַ֣ד עָלָ֔יו מִֽנַּעֲרֵ֖י יוֹאָ֑ב וַיֹּ֗אמֶר מִי֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר חָפֵ֧ץ בְּיוֹאָ֛ב וּמִ֥י אֲשֶׁר־לְדָוִ֖ד אַחֲרֵ֥י יוֹאָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: In the mean time some men of Joab's company stopping at the dead body of Amasa, said: Behold he that would have been in Joab's stead the companion of David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta yksi Joabin palvelioista seisoi hänen tykönänsä ja sanoi: kuka tahtoo pitää Joabin ja Davidin kanssa, hän seuratkaan Joabia!
verses.king_james: And one of Joab’s men stood by him, and said, He that favoureth Joab, and he that is for David, let him go after Joab.

verses.latin_vulgate: Amasa autem conspersus sanguine jacebat in media via. Vidit hoc quidam vir, quod subsisteret omnis populus ad videndum eum, et amovit Amasam de via in agrum, operuitque eum vestimento, ne subsisterent transeuntes propter eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַעֲמָשָׂ֛א מִתְגֹּלֵ֥ל בַּדָּ֖ם בְּת֣וֹךְ הַֽמְסִלָּ֑ה וַיַּ֨רְא הָאִ֜ישׁ כִּֽי־עָמַ֣ד כׇּל־הָעָ֗ם וַיַּסֵּב֩ אֶת־עֲמָשָׂ֨א מִן־הַֽמְסִלָּ֤ה הַשָּׂדֶה֙ וַיַּשְׁלֵ֤ךְ עָלָיו֙ בֶּ֔גֶד כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר רָאָ֔ה כׇּל־הַבָּ֥א עָלָ֖יו וְעָמָֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Amasa imbrued with blood, lay in the midst of the way. A certain man saw this that all the people stood still to look upon him, so he removed Amasa out of the highway into the field, and covered him with a garment, that they who passed might, not stop on his account.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Amasa makasi tahrattuna veressä keskellä tietä. Kuin yksi näki sen, että kaikki kansa seisahti, siirsi hän Amasan tieltä kedolle ja heitti vaatteen hänen päällensä; sillä hän näki, että jokainen joka hänen tykönsä tuli, seisahti siihen.
verses.king_james: And Amasa wallowed in blood in the midst of the highway. And when the man saw that all the people stood still, he removed Amasa out of the highway into the field, and cast a cloth upon him, when he saw that every one that came by him stood still.

verses.latin_vulgate: Amoto ergo illo de via, transibat omnis vir sequens Joab ad persequendum Seba filium Bochri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר הֹגָ֖ה מִן־הַֽמְסִלָּ֑ה עָבַ֤ר כׇּל־אִישׁ֙ אַחֲרֵ֣י יוֹאָ֔ב לִרְדֹּ֕ף אַחֲרֵ֖י שֶׁ֥בַע בֶּן־בִּכְרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he was removed out of the way, all the people went on following Joab to pursue after Seba the son of Bochri.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin hän oli tieltä siirretty, meni jokainen Joabin jälkeen, ajamaan Sebaa Bikrin poikaa takaa.
verses.king_james: When he was removed out of the highway, all the people went on after Joab, to pursue after Sheba the son of Bichri.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro ille transierat per omnes tribus Israël in Abelam et Bethmaacha : omnesque viri electi congregati fuerant ad eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיַּעֲבֹ֞ר בְּכׇל־שִׁבְטֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אָבֵ֛לָה וּבֵ֥ית מַעֲכָ֖ה וְכׇל־הַבֵּרִ֑ים {ס} (ויקלהו) [וַיִּקָּ֣הֲל֔וּ] וַיָּבֹ֖אוּ אַף־אַחֲרָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Now he had passed through all the tribes of Israel unto Abela and Bethmaacha: and all the chosen men were gathered together unto him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän vaelsi kaikki Israelin sukukunnat lävitse Abelaan ja BetMaakaan ja koko Berimiin, ja ne kokoontuivat ja seurasivat myös häntä.
verses.king_james: And he went through all the tribes of Israel unto Abel, and to Beth–maachah, and all the Berites: and they were gathered together, and went also after him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venerunt itaque, et oppugnabant eum in Abela et in Bethmaacha, et circumdederunt munitionibus civitatem, et obsessa est urbs : omnis autem turba quæ erat cum Joab, moliebatur destruere muros.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבֹ֜אוּ וַיָּצֻ֣רוּ עָלָ֗יו בְּאָבֵ֙לָה֙ בֵּ֣ית הַֽמַּעֲכָ֔ה וַיִּשְׁפְּכ֤וּ סֹֽלְלָה֙ אֶל־הָעִ֔יר וַֽתַּעֲמֹ֖ד בַּחֵ֑ל וְכׇל־הָעָם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אֶת־יוֹאָ֔ב מַשְׁחִיתִ֖ם לְהַפִּ֥יל הַחוֹמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they came, and besieged him in Abela, and in Bethmaacha, and they cast up works round the city, and the city was besieged: and all the people that were with Joab, laboured to throw down the walls.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta kuin he tulivat, niin he piirittivät hänen Abelassa BetMaakan tykönä, ja rakensivat vallin kaupungin ympärille, joka seisoi muurin tasalla. Mutta kaikki kansa, joka Joabin myötä oli, karkasi muuria kukistamaan.
verses.king_james: And they came and besieged him in Abel of Beth–maachah, and they cast up a bank against the city, and it stood in the trench: and all the people that were with Joab battered the wall, to throw it down.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et exclamavit mulier sapiens de civitate : Audite, audite : dicite Joab : Appropinqua huc, et loquar tecum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּקְרָ֛א אִשָּׁ֥ה חֲכָמָ֖ה מִן־הָעִ֑יר שִׁמְע֤וּ שִׁמְעוּ֙ אִמְרוּ־נָ֣א אֶל־יוֹאָ֔ב קְרַ֣ב עַד־הֵ֔נָּה וַאֲדַבְּרָ֖ה אֵלֶֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And a wise woman cried out from the city: Hear, hear, and say to Joab: Come near hither, and I will speak with thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin toimellinen vaimo huusi kaupungista: kuulkaat, kuulkaat! sanokaat Joabille, että hän tulee tänne lähes, minä puhuttelen häntä.
verses.king_james: Then cried a wise woman out of the city, Hear, hear; say, I pray you, unto Joab, Come near hither, that I may speak with thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui cum accessisset ad eam, ait illi : Tu es Joab ? Et ille respondit : Ego. Ad quem sic locuta est : Audi sermones ancillæ tuæ. Qui respondit : Audio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְרַ֣ב אֵלֶ֔יהָ וַתֹּ֧אמֶר הָאִשָּׁ֛ה הַאַתָּ֥ה יוֹאָ֖ב וַיֹּ֣אמֶר אָ֑נִי וַתֹּ֣אמֶר ל֗וֹ שְׁמַע֙ דִּבְרֵ֣י אֲמָתֶ֔ךָ וַיֹּ֖אמֶר שֹׁמֵ֥עַ אָנֹֽכִי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when he was come near to her, she said to him: Art thou Joab? And he answered: I am. And she spoke thus to him: Hear the words of thy handmaid. He answered: I do hear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kuin hän tuli hänen tykönsä, sanoi vaimo: oletkos Joab? Hän vastasi: olen. Vaimo sanoi hänelle: kuule piikas sanat! Hän vastasi: minä kuulen.
verses.king_james: And when he was come near unto her, the woman said, Art thou Joab? And he answered, I am he. Then she said unto him, Hear the words of thine handmaid. And he answered, I do hear.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rursumque illa : Sermo, inquit, dicebatur in veteri proverbio : Qui interrogant, interrogent in Abela : et sic perficiebant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֹּ֖אמֶר לֵאמֹ֑ר דַּבֵּ֨ר יְדַבְּר֤וּ בָרִֽאשֹׁנָה֙ לֵאמֹ֔ר שָׁא֧וֹל יְשָׁאֲל֛וּ בְּאָבֵ֖ל וְכֵ֥ן הֵתַֽמּוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And she again said: A saying was used in the old proverb: They that inquire, let them inquire in Abela: and so they made an end.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän puhui, sanoen: muinoin sanottiin: joka kysellä tahtoo, hän kysykään Abelassa, ja niin se menestyi.
verses.king_james: Then she spake, saying, They were wont to speak in old time, saying, They shall surely ask counsel at Abel: and so they ended the matter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonne ego sum quæ respondeo veritatem in Israël, et tu quæris subvertere civitatem et evertere matrem in Israël ? quare præcipitas hæreditatem Domini ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָנֹכִ֕י שְׁלֻמֵ֖י אֱמוּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל אַתָּ֣ה מְבַקֵּ֗שׁ לְהָמִ֨ית עִ֤יר וְאֵם֙ בְּיִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל לָ֥מָּה תְבַלַּ֖ע נַחֲלַ֥ת יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Am not I she that answer truth in Israel, and thou seekest to destroy the city, and to overthrow a mother in Israel? Why wilt thou throw down the inheritance of the Lord?
verses.finnish_biblia: Minä olen rauhallinen ja uskollinen (kaupunki) Israelissa, ja sinä tahdot tappaa sen kaupungin ja äidin Israelissa: miksis tahdot niellä Herran perimisen?
verses.king_james: I am one of them that are peaceable and faithful in Israel: thou seekest to destroy a city and a mother in Israel: why wilt thou swallow up the inheritance of the Lord?

verses.latin_vulgate: Respondensque Joab, ait : Absit, absit hoc a me : non præcipito, neque demolior.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֥עַן יוֹאָ֖ב וַיֹּאמַ֑ר חָלִ֤ילָה חָלִ֙ילָה֙ לִ֔י אִם־אֲבַלַּ֖ע וְאִם־אַשְׁחִֽית׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Joab answering said: God forbid, God forbid that I should, I do not throw down, nor destroy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Silloin vastasi Joab ja sanoi: pois se, pois se minusta, että minä nielisin ja hävittäisin.
verses.king_james: And Joab answered and said, Far be it, far be it from me, that I should swallow up or destroy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non sic se habet res, sed homo de monte Ephraim, Seba filius Bochri cognomine, levavit manum suam contra regem David : tradite illum solum, et recedemus a civitate. Et ait mulier ad Joab : Ecce caput ejus mittetur ad te per murum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹא־כֵ֣ן הַדָּבָ֗ר כִּ֡י אִישׁ֩ מֵהַ֨ר אֶפְרַ֜יִם שֶׁ֧בַע בֶּן־בִּכְרִ֣י שְׁמ֗וֹ נָשָׂ֤א יָדוֹ֙ בַּמֶּ֣לֶךְ בְּדָוִ֔ד תְּנוּ־אֹת֣וֹ לְבַדּ֔וֹ וְאֵלְכָ֖ה מֵעַ֣ל הָעִ֑יר וַתֹּ֤אמֶר הָאִשָּׁה֙ אֶל־יוֹאָ֔ב הִנֵּ֥ה רֹאשׁ֛וֹ מֻשְׁלָ֥ךְ אֵלֶ֖יךָ בְּעַ֥ד הַחוֹמָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: The matter is not so, but a man of mount Ephraim, Seba the son of Bochri by name, hath lifted up his hand against king David: deliver him only, and we will depart from the city. And the woman said to Joab: Behold his head shall be thrown to thee from the wall.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei asia niin ole; vaan yksi mies Ephraimin vuorelta nimeltä Seba Bikrin poika on nostanut kapinan David kuningasta vastaan: antakaat hän ainoastansa, ja minä erkanen kaupungista. Ja vaimo sanoi Joabille: katso, hänen päänsä pitää sinulle heitettämän muurin ylitse.
verses.king_james: The matter is not so: but a man of mount Ephraim, Sheba the son of Bichri by name, hath lifted up his hand against the king, even against David: deliver him only, and I will depart from the city. And the woman said unto Joab, Behold, his head shall be thrown to thee over the wall.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ingressa est ergo ad omnem populum, et locuta est eis sapienter : qui abscissum caput Seba filii Bochri projecerunt ad Joab. Et ille cecinit tuba, et recesserunt ab urbe, unusquisque in tabernacula sua : Joab autem reversus est Jerusalem ad regem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתָּבוֹא֩ הָאִשָּׁ֨ה אֶל־כׇּל־הָעָ֜ם בְּחׇכְמָתָ֗הּ וַֽיִּכְרְת֞וּ אֶת־רֹ֨אשׁ שֶׁ֤בַע בֶּן־בִּכְרִי֙ וַיַּשְׁלִ֣כוּ אֶל־יוֹאָ֔ב וַיִּתְקַע֙ בַּשֹּׁפָ֔ר וַיָּפֻ֥צוּ מֵעַל־הָעִ֖יר אִ֣ישׁ לְאֹהָלָ֑יו וְיוֹאָ֛ב שָׁ֥ב יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם אֶל־הַמֶּֽלֶךְ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: So she went to all the people, and spoke to them wisely: and they cut off the head of Seba the son of Bochri, and cast it out to Joab. And he sounded the trumpet, and they departed from the city, every one to their home: and Joab returned to Jerusalem to the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vaimo tuli kaiken kansan tykö toimellansa. Ja he hakkasivat Seban Bikrin pojan pään pois ja heittivät Joabille. Ja hän soitti basunalla, ja he hajosivat kaikki kaupungin tyköä itsekukin majoihinsa; mutta Joab palasi Jerusalemiin kuninkaan tykö.
verses.king_james: Then the woman went unto all the people in her wisdom. And they cut off the head of Sheba the son of Bichri, and cast it out to Joab. And he blew a trumpet, and they retired from the city, every man to his tent. And Joab returned to Jerusalem unto the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuit ergo Joab super omnem exercitum Israël : Banaias autem filius Jojadæ super Cerethæos et Phelethæos :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיוֹאָ֕ב אֶ֥ל כׇּל־הַצָּבָ֖א יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וּבְנָיָה֙ בֶּן־יְה֣וֹיָדָ֔ע עַל־(הכרי) [הַכְּרֵתִ֖י] וְעַל־הַפְּלֵתִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: So Joab was over all the army of Israel: and Banaias the son of Joiada was over the Cerethites and Phelethites,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Joab oli koko Israelin sotajoukon ylitse; vaan BenaJa Jojadan poika oli Kretin ja Pletin ylitse;
verses.king_james: Now Joab was over all the host of Israel: and Benaiah the son of Jehoiada was over the Cherethites and over the Pelethites:

verses.latin_vulgate: Aduram vero super tributa : porro Josaphat filius Ahilud, a commentariis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲדֹרָ֖ם עַל־הַמַּ֑ס וִיהוֹשָׁפָ֥ט בֶּן־אֲחִיל֖וּד הַמַּזְכִּֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: But Aduram over the tributes: and Josaphat the son of Ahilud was recorder.
verses.finnish_biblia: Adoram oli verorahan haltia; Josaphat Ahiludin poika oli kansleri;
verses.king_james: And Adoram was over the tribute: and Jehoshaphat the son of Ahilud was recorder:

verses.latin_vulgate: Siva autem, scriba : Sadoc vero et Abiathar, sacerdotes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ושיא) [וּשְׁוָ֖א] סֹפֵ֑ר וְצָד֥וֹק וְאֶבְיָתָ֖ר כֹּהֲנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Siva was scribe: and Sadoc and Abiathar, priests.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Seja oli kirjoittaja; ja Zadok ja Abjatar olivat papit;
verses.king_james: And Sheva was scribe: and Zadok and Abiathar were the priests:

verses.latin_vulgate: Ira autem Jairites erat sacerdos David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַ֗ם עִירָא֙ הַיָּ֣אִרִ֔י הָיָ֥ה כֹהֵ֖ן לְדָוִֽד׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Ira the Jairite was the priest of David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös Ira Jairilainen oli Davidin ylimmäinen.
verses.king_james: And Ira also the Jairite was a chief ruler about David.
